title: Eezi Move - better every year
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Eezi Move Furniture Removals...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Eezi Move Furniture Removals began its humble journey in the early 1990s in Sunnyside, Pretoria.


> What started as a simple furniture sales and delivery business soon evolved into what South Africans now know and trust as Eezi Move - a leading name in the relocation industry.


With the Western Cape experiencing a significant semigration trend over the past few years, Eezi Move proudly opened its George branch in 2018 to better serve the Garden Route and surrounding areas. Since then, the branch has gone from strength to strength, achieving new milestones each year. Thanks to the incredible support of our loyal clients, we’ve been voted Best Moving Company in George for two consecutive years - and we’re honoured to be nominated for a third in 2025!

What drives our success At Eezi Move, we believe the key to our success lies in our meticulous attention to detail and our ability to see every move from our client’s perspective. We know moving isn’t something most people do often, and when they do, it can be one of life’s most stressful experiences. That’s why we go the extra mile to make every move as eezi, seamless and transparent as possible.

From relocating a single fridge from Wilderness to Kathu, to handling entire luxury home moves, our dedicated team is equipped to manage relocations not just within the Garden Route, but also to Port Elizabeth, Cape Town, Durban, Gauteng, and just about anywhere else across the country. And now - with immense pride - Eezi Move offers international relocations, helping families and businesses take their next steps beyond South Africa’s borders.

Growth, new facilities and expanded services A huge part of our success story belongs to our incredible George team. Every driver, packer, loader, and porter plays a vital role in making our clients’ moving experiences effortless and positive.

Their hard work and dedication recently culminated in a big move for the team itself - to brand new, larger, and upgraded facilities in Brick Street in 2024. These modern premises allow us to provide enhanced, spacious, and secure long- and short-term storage solutions, giving clients even greater peace of mind during their relocation process.

Our purpose and inspiration What inspires us every day is not just the moves we manage, but the people whose lives we touch. From our visionary CEO and supportive board of directors - who fiercely protect our founding principles and ensure sustainable employment for over 250 families nationwide - to our wonderful clients, each move represents more than just logistics. It’s about fresh starts, new memories, and meaningful connections.

There’s nothing we appreciate more than hearing a heartfelt “thank you” after a move exceeds expectations. It’s the fuel that keeps our engines running and motivates us to be better than the day before.

Thank you, George, for your continued trust, and for nominating us once again for Best Moving Company 2025! Here’s to making even more moves a whole lot eezi.


> Click here to vote for Eezi Move: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
